subject: 🏃 Saturday — Upper Pull
html:
Today: Upper Pull at the gym. This is the last strength session of Chassis Build Week 1. Five exercises, 3×10–12 each, pure maintenance — get in and out in ~25 minutes. Don't forget your daily mobility flush first (~12 min): T-spine extensions (PT), standing lunges with hip IR (PT), world's greatest stretch, 90/90, couch stretch, hip CARs, cat-cow.

Warm-up: Arm circles (10 each direction), shoulder rolls (10 forward/back), scapular retractions (10 reps), cat-cow (10 reps), band pull-aparts (10 reps), dead hangs (2 × 10 sec).

Recommended weights:

ExerciseWeightSets × Reps
Pull-upsBodyweight (if <8 reps, use lat pulldown at 85 lbs)3×10–12
Dumbbell row30 lbs/hand3×10–12
Face pullsLight band / 20 lbs cable3×12–15
Bicep curls15 lbs/hand3×10–12
Band pull-apartsLight band3×15

Focus cue: Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of every pulling rep — full contraction, 1-second hold, then controlled lowering. This is maintenance work, so own the movement, don't rush it.

Context: Week 1 of 4 in Chassis Build — 3 weeks to PT follow-up on May 15 (92 days to race). Your knee has been Green across all four sessions this week, including yesterday's 3.57-mile run. That's the best weekly signal since training started. Tomorrow is cycling 60 min easy or a 90-min hike — pick whichever sounds fun, keep it low-impact. Solid week, Paul.
